name: feishu-mcp
description: Feishu/Lark workspace MCP server — document exfiltration via NAT (Natural Adversarial Trigger) attack; workspace data leakage (arXiv:2509.06572)
version_note: Version 1.0.5 is the estimated npm stable release closest to the paper submission date (September 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 1.0.5 is the best estimate based on npm release history around that date.
